stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas rally-killer GIDP · Bot 3
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas grounds into a double play, third baseman Joshua Kuroda-Grauer to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Jonah Heim. Munetaka Murakami out at 2nd. Miguel Vargas out at 1st.
